title: Wano Splits Between Udon and the Flower Capital
description: On pages 14–17, this part focuses on Beast Pirates, Unknown person #13, Dobon, Hyogoro, Unknown person #14, Unknown person #15 as The Wano rebellion spreads between Udon prison, the Flower Capital, and the first shocks around Komurasaki and Orochi.
scene: The rebellion’s pieces scatter across Wano while Luffy struggles in Udon and Orochi’s court grows unstable in the Flower Capital.

dialogue.speaker: Beast Pirates
dialogue.text: Which one of you prisoners...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: HIPPO...!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: BUGH!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: cleared out all of the nations we had in the storage...!!?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Master Dobon is here....!! His fusion with the hippo is so weird!!

dialogue.speaker: Dobon
dialogue.text: DOBON HPO SWE use

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: GRANDA H'You!!

dialogue.speaker: Hyogoro
dialogue.text: Ah!! He's crushing Grandpa Hyogorou!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Crawl out from under there, Gramps!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: HOW DARE YOU IGNORE MY OR-

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Hippo...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The Hippo decided to close its mouth on a whim, so now we can't hear master Dobon anymore!!

dialogue.speaker: Dobon
dialogue.text: But, Master Dobon... they earned their food!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I think they worked hard and exchanged their work for food, so we couldn't stop them from getting it!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He's trying to say something from inside there!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I've brought the prisoners that you're looking for!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: @URP... GIMME A SECOND! I NEED TO DIGEST THIS FOOD...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: They ate way too much!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I've never seen someone have a bloated stomach in here!! I'm so jealous....!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: So it was you two!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: How dare you!! Your gluttony is why I, a man known as a big- eater, was only able to get three kibi- Dangos!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Look at this mouth!! Does that seem like enough food to you?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Anyone become

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Huh...? Those guys... are shrinking in size!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Here's a word of warning for you two!! If you try and fight back against a guard...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Your arms will be cut off the first time you do it...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And your legs will be cut off if you do it again!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Everyone experience

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The third time you do it will be your last!! You'll be executed on the spot. Keep that in mind.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: That's how it works here!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You don't have the right to fight back!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hey, we're just weaklings whose strength has been depleted because of this seasons.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: All we did was take our work seriously!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Your crime is eating all of my food!! You need to be DisCIPU-

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: WAAAH!! They got eaten!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What a shame... Inside that mouth is master Dobon's murder chamber...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Saying the game, I'll

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: HIPPO!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: Deputy Warden DoBooooon!!?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You've done it now!! You're gonna be executed!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: Where's your proof?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: Huh!? Is

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: WAY TO GOODOOOOO!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: #.Ch. 926 /End

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You two are the prisoners' stars of hope!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: The worst won't tolerate this!!!!

summary: This section advances the Wano - Udon and Flower Capital storyline with 46 dialogue beats. Luffy’s prison struggle, Big Mom’s amnesia, and the Flower Capital drama show Wano’s rebellion becoming harder to control.
